title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody
plot: L’informaticien Ichirô Suzuki, alias Satô, se réveille à l’intérieur du jeu vidéo qu’il était en train de programmer. Comme il connaît bien toutes les fonctions et les recoins du jeu, il se révèle très à l'aise dans ce monde. Cependant, il préfère rester discret à ce sujet et tandis qu’il part à sa découverte, il tente de venir en aide aux différents personnages qu’il croise.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E01 - The Catastrophe That Started with a Death March

info.plot: Suzuki Ichirou is a programmer who is working a death march to keep up with nightmare combination of unreasonable deadlines and unreliable coworkers. After crawling under his desk for some much-needed shut-eye, he awakes to find himself in a familiar, but distinct, fantasy world.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E02 - Exploring a City That Started with a Death March

info.plot: Satou seems to be stuck in the parallel world that looks like an amalgamation of the game projects he's worked on. And while his insider knowledge of the world's systems gives him an advantage, he still needs to find his bearings before he can start planning what to do next. To that end, he heads to the nearest city to establish a base of operations.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E03 - Love That Started with a Death March

info.plot: Satou is shown around the city by Zena when they encounter demi-human slaves who are being abused by a mob. But prejudice isn't the only problem when everyone suddenly finds themselves deep in a dangerous labyrinth.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E04 - Labyrinth Exploration That Started with a Death March

info.plot: With the aid of the slaves he was trying to help, Satou gradually starts his trek to escape the labyrinth, and rescue the other people who were trapped with him.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E05 - The Crazy Princess That Started with a Death March

info.plot: Satou chooses to become Tama, Pochi, and Liz's new master rather than let them return to a life of slavery. He also ends up with the strange sisters Arisa and Lulu, the younger of which seems to have a secret tied to Satou's original world...

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E06 - City Defense That Began with a Death March

info.plot: With five girls now in his care, Satou needs to find more permanent lodging. Unfortunately his real estate ventures will have to wait, as the city comes under attack by giant insects!

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E07 - Camping Lessons That Began with a Death March

info.plot: Satou and the gang make plans to help return the elf girl that he rescued to her home in the forest, but first they need to prepare for the long trip by learning how to rough it outdoors.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E08 - Immortality That Began with a Death March

info.plot: Mia has been kidnapped, and Satou is hot on the trail of the strange specter that took her. The path leads to the place she originally was rescued from, the massive tower known as the Cradle.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E09 - Deeply Held Attachment That Started with a Death March

info.plot: Satou reaches the top of the Cradle, but he won't be able to take Mia back before confronting a final challenge... One that will end with a surprising addition to his entourage.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E10 - The Hunting Song That Started with a Death March

info.plot: The journey to return Mia home begins, giving Satou a chance to experiment with the functionality of the fantasy world during the long trip.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E11 - The Fantasy Conspiracy That Started with a Death March

info.plot: The journey to take Mia home continues, with Satou running afoul the local nobles by disrupting their scheme involving the distribution of healing potions.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E12 - A Trip to the Underworld That Started with a Death March

info.plot: Satou has to deliver on an arrangement where countless factors have been twisted against him, but will that be enough to keep him from pulling through?

1.title: FR - Alkhallat plus - S01E01 - Desert Rules
